description: Versioned eligibility policy for IPEDS institution candidates. Scores institutions on data completeness, institutional legitimacy, and product readiness.

blockingRules.condition: CLOSEDAT IS NOT NULL AND CLOSEDAT != ''
DEATHYR IS NOT NULL AND DEATHYR != ''
blockingRules.reason: Institution year of death is set

warningRules.reason: Medical-only institution, may lack standard academic programs

warningRules.condition: STABBR IN ('AA','AE','AP') OR STABBR NOT IN ('AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC')
LONGITUD IS NULL OR LONGITUD = '' OR LATITUDE IS NULL OR LATITUDE = ''

identityComplete.description: Has non-blank INSTNM, CITY, STABBR, CONTROL, SECTOR

fourYearDegreeGranting.description: ICLEVEL indicates 4-year or above, DEGGRANT confers bachelor or higher

bachelorProgramsPresent.description: Has >= 1 CIP code with PBACHL > 0 in C2024DEP

metricsComplete.description: Has >= 2 structured metrics with valueStatus=REPORTED in InstitutionMetric
